title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/storage to v1.51.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate logo banner](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/storage](https://togithub.com/containers/storage) | require | minor | `v1.50.2` -> `v1.51.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/storage (github.com/containers/storage)</summary>

### [`v1.51.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/releases/tag/v1.51.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.50.2...v1.51.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to v1.50.2  by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1711](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1711)
-   overlay, composefs: mount loop device RO by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1712](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1712)
-   Run codespell on code by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1714](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1714)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/klauspost/compress to v1.17.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1718](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1718)
-   store: serialize container deletion by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1722](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1722)
-   pkg/system: reduce retry timeout for EnsureRemoveAll by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1723](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1723)
-   overlay, composefs: use data-only lower layers by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1713](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1713)
-   store: call RecordWrite() before graphDriver Cleanup() by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1724](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1724)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.13.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1725](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1725)
-   store: fix error message by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1726](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1726)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/klauspost/compress to v1.17.1 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1730](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1730)
-   overlay, composefs: use mkcomposefs to generate composefs by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1727](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1727)
-   overlay: select additional image store path when using image store by [@​sstosh](https://togithub.com/sstosh) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1732](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1732)
-   overlay: do not precreate the composefs layers dir by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1734](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1734)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/klauspost/compress to v1.17.2 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1736](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1736)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20231004 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1731](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1731)
-   Don't call UpdateLayerIDMap when creating a layer with no parent by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1735](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1735)
-   build(deps): bump google.golang.org/grpc from 1.57.0 to 1.57.1 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1738](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1738)
-   archive: fix mode for root dir with ForceMask by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1739](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1739)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz to v0.15.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1741](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1741)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz to v0.15.1 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1742](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1742)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/runc to v1.1.10 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1745](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1745)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/moby/sys/mountinfo to v0.7.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1748](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1748)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/microsoft/hcsshim to v0.12.0-rc.1 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1746](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1746)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.14.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1747](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1747)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/moby/sys/mountinfo from 0.7.0 to 0.7.1 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1754](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1754)
-   docs: document convert_images by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1750](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1750)
-   unshare: export rootless GID by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1755](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1755)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.50.2...v1.51.0

</details>
